entry.title: жХ∞жНЃеЇУжЧґйЧіе≠ШеВ®
entry.content:
жХ∞жНЃеЇУе¶ВдљХе≠ШеВ®жЧґйЧіпЉЯдљ†зЬЯзЪДзЯ•йБУеРЧпЉЯ

жИСдїђеє≥жЧґеЉАеПСдЄ≠дЄНеПѓйБњеЕНзЪДе∞±жШѓи¶Бе≠ШеВ®жЧґйЧіпЉМжѓФе¶ВжИСдїђи¶БиЃ∞ељХжУНдљЬи°®дЄ≠ињЩжЭ°иЃ∞ељХзЪДжЧґйЧігАБиЃ∞ељХиљђиі¶зЪДдЇ§жШУжЧґйЧігАБиЃ∞ељХеЗЇеПСжЧґйЧіз≠Йз≠ЙгАВдљ†дЉЪеПСзО∞ињЩдЄ™жЧґйЧіињЩдЄ™дЄЬи•њдЄОжИСдїђеЉАеПСзЪДиБФз≥їињШжШѓйЭЮеЄЄзіІеѓЖзЪДпЉМзФ®зЪДе•љдЄОдЄНе•љдЉЪзїЩжИСдїђзЪДдЄЪеК°зФЪиЗ≥еКЯиГљеЄ¶жЭ•еЊИе§ІзЪДељ±еУНгАВжЙАдї•пЉМжИСдїђжЬЙењЕи¶БйЗНжЦ∞еЗЇеПСпЉМе•ље•љиЃ§иѓЖдЄАдЄЛињЩдЄ™дЄЬи•њгАВ

ињЩжШѓдЄАзѓЗзЯ≠е∞Пз≤ЊжВНзЪДжЦЗзЂ†пЉМдїФзїЖйШЕиѓїдЄАеЃЪиГље≠¶еИ∞дЄНе∞СдЄЬи•њпЉБ

1.еИЗиЃ∞дЄНи¶БзФ®е≠Чзђ¶дЄ≤е≠ШеВ®жЧ•жЬЯ

жИСиЃ∞еЊЧжИСеЬ®е§Іе≠¶зЪДжЧґеАЩе∞±ињЩж†Јеє≤ињЗпЉМиАМдЄФзО∞еЬ®еЊИе§ЪеѓєжХ∞жНЃеЇУдЄНе§™дЇЖиІ£зЪДжЦ∞жЙЛдєЯдЉЪињЩж†Јеє≤пЉМеПѓиІБпЉМињЩзІНе≠ШеВ®жЧ•жЬЯзЪДжЦєеЉПзЪДдЉШзВєињШжШѓжЬЙзЪДпЉМе∞±жШѓзЃАеНХзЫізЩљпЉМеЃєжШУдЄКжЙЛгАВ

дљЖжШѓпЉМињЩжШѓдЄНж≠£з°ЃзЪДеБЪж≥ХпЉМдЄїи¶БдЉЪжЬЙдЄЛйЭҐдЄ§дЄ™йЧЃйҐШпЉЪ

  1. е≠Чзђ¶дЄ≤еН†зФ®зЪДз©ЇйЧіжЫіе§ІпЉБ
  2. е≠Чзђ¶дЄ≤е≠ШеВ®зЪДжЧ•жЬЯжѓФиЊГжХИзОЗжѓФиЊГдљОпЉИйАРдЄ™е≠Чзђ¶ињЫи°МжѓФеѓєпЉЙпЉМжЧ†ж≥ХзФ®жЧ•жЬЯзЫЄеЕ≥зЪД API ињЫи°МиЃ°зЃЧеТМжѓФиЊГгАВ

2.Datetime еТМ Timestamp дєЛйЧіжКЙжЛ©

Datetime еТМ Timestamp жШѓ MySQL жПРдЊЫзЪДдЄ§зІНжѓФиЊГзЫЄдЉЉзЪДдњЭе≠ШжЧґйЧізЪДжХ∞жНЃз±їеЮЛгАВдїЦдїђдЄ§иАЕз©ґзЂЯиѓ•е¶ВдљХйАЙжЛ©еСҐпЉЯ

йАЪеЄЄжИСдїђйГљдЉЪй¶ЦйАЙ TimestampгАВ дЄЛйЭҐиѓідЄАдЄЛдЄЇдїАдєИињЩж†ЈеБЪ!

2.1 DateTime з±їеЮЛж≤°жЬЙжЧґеМЇдњ°жБѓзЪД

DateTime з±їеЮЛжШѓж≤°жЬЙжЧґеМЇдњ°жБѓзЪДпЉИжЧґеМЇжЧ†еЕ≥пЉЙ пЉМDateTime з±їеЮЛдњЭе≠ШзЪДжЧґйЧійГљжШѓељУеЙНдЉЪиѓЭжЙАиЃЊзљЃзЪДжЧґеМЇеѓєеЇФзЪДжЧґйЧігАВињЩж†Је∞±дЉЪжЬЙдїАдєИйЧЃйҐШеСҐпЉЯељУдљ†зЪДжЧґеМЇжЫіжНҐдєЛеРОпЉМжѓФе¶Вдљ†зЪДжЬНеК°еЩ®жЫіжНҐеЬ∞еЭАжИЦиАЕжЫіжНҐеЃҐжИЈзЂѓињЮжО•жЧґеМЇиЃЊзљЃзЪДиѓЭпЉМе∞±дЉЪеѓЉиЗідљ†дїОжХ∞жНЃеЇУдЄ≠иѓїеЗЇзЪДжЧґйЧійФЩиѓѓгАВдЄНи¶Бе∞ПзЬЛињЩдЄ™йЧЃйҐШпЉМеЊИе§Ъз≥їзїЯе∞±жШѓеЫ†дЄЇињЩдЄ™йЧЃйҐШйЧєеЗЇдЇЖеЊИе§ЪзђСиѓЭгАВ

Timestamp еТМжЧґеМЇжЬЙеЕ≥гАВTimestamp з±їеЮЛе≠ЧжЃµзЪДеАЉдЉЪйЪПзЭАжЬНеК°еЩ®жЧґеМЇзЪДеПШеМЦиАМеПШеМЦпЉМиЗ™еК®жНҐзЃЧжИРзЫЄеЇФзЪДжЧґйЧіпЉМиѓізЃАеНХзВєе∞±жШѓеЬ®дЄНеРМжЧґеМЇпЉМжЯ•иѓҐеИ∞еРМдЄАдЄ™жЭ°иЃ∞ељХж≠§е≠ЧжЃµзЪДеАЉдЉЪдЄНдЄАж†ЈгАВ

дЄЛйЭҐеЃЮйЩЕжЉФз§ЇдЄАдЄЛпЉБ

еїЇи°® SQL иѓ≠еП•пЉЪ

жПТеЕ•жХ∞жНЃпЉЪ

жЯ•зЬЛжХ∞жНЃпЉЪ

зїУжЮЬпЉЪ

зО∞еЬ®жИСдїђињРи°М

дњЃжФєељУеЙНдЉЪиѓЭзЪДжЧґеМЇ:

еЖНжђ°жЯ•зЬЛжХ∞жНЃпЉЪ

жЙ©е±ХпЉЪдЄАдЇЫеЕ≥дЇО MySQL жЧґеМЇиЃЊзљЃзЪДдЄАдЄ™еЄЄзФ® sql еСљдї§

2.2 DateTime з±їеЮЛиАЧиієз©ЇйЧіжЫіе§І

Timestamp еП™йЬАи¶БдљњзФ® 4 дЄ™е≠ЧиКВзЪДе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧіпЉМдљЖжШѓ DateTime йЬАи¶БиАЧиіє 8 дЄ™е≠ЧиКВзЪДе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧігАВдљЖжШѓпЉМињЩж†ЈеРМж†ЈйА†жИРдЇЖдЄАдЄ™йЧЃйҐШпЉМTimestamp и°®з§ЇзЪДжЧґйЧіиМГеЫіжЫіе∞ПгАВ

  • DateTime пЉЪ1000-01-01 00:00:00 ~ 9999-12-31 23:59:59
  • TimestampпЉЪ 1970-01-01 00:00:01 ~ 2037-12-31 23:59:59

Timestamp еЬ®дЄНеРМзЙИжЬђзЪД MySQL дЄ≠жЬЙзїЖеЊЃеЈЃеИЂгАВ

3 еЖНзЬЛ MySQL жЧ•жЬЯз±їеЮЛе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧі

дЄЛеЫЊжШѓ MySQL 5.6 зЙИжЬђдЄ≠жЧ•жЬЯз±їеЮЛжЙАеН†зЪДе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧіпЉЪ

еПѓдї•зЬЛеЗЇ 5.6.4 дєЛеРОзЪД MySQL е§ЪеЗЇдЇЖдЄАдЄ™йЬАи¶Б 0 пљЮ 3 е≠ЧиКВзЪДе∞ПжХ∞дљНгАВDatatime еТМ Timestamp дЉЪжЬЙеЗ†зІНдЄНеРМзЪДе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧіеН†зФ®гАВ

дЄЇдЇЖжЦєдЊњпЉМжЬђжЦЗжИСдїђињШжШѓйїШиЃ§ Timestamp еП™йЬАи¶БдљњзФ® 4 дЄ™е≠ЧиКВзЪДе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧіпЉМдљЖжШѓ DateTime йЬАи¶БиАЧиіє 8 дЄ™е≠ЧиКВзЪДе≠ШеВ®з©ЇйЧігАВ

4.жХ∞еАЉеЮЛжЧґйЧіжИ≥жШѓжЫіе•љзЪДйАЙжЛ©еРЧпЉЯ

еЊИе§ЪжЧґеАЩпЉМжИСдїђдєЯдЉЪдљњзФ® int жИЦиАЕ bigint з±їеЮЛзЪДжХ∞еАЉдєЯе∞±жШѓжЧґйЧіжИ≥жЭ•и°®з§ЇжЧґйЧігАВ

ињЩзІНе≠ШеВ®жЦєеЉПзЪДеЕЈжЬЙ Timestamp з±їеЮЛзЪДжЙАеЕЈжЬЙдЄАдЇЫдЉШзВєпЉМеєґдЄФдљњзФ®еЃГзЪДињЫи°МжЧ•жЬЯжОТеЇПдї•еПКеѓєжѓФз≠ЙжУНдљЬзЪДжХИзОЗдЉЪжЫійЂШпЉМиЈ®з≥їзїЯдєЯеЊИжЦєдЊњпЉМжѓХзЂЯеП™жШѓе≠ШжФЊзЪДжХ∞еАЉгАВзЉЇзВєдєЯеЊИжШОжШЊпЉМе∞±жШѓжХ∞жНЃзЪДеПѓиѓїжАІе§™еЈЃдЇЖпЉМдљ†жЧ†ж≥ХзЫіиІВзЪДзЬЛеИ∞еЕЈдљУжЧґйЧігАВ

жЧґйЧіжИ≥зЪДеЃЪдєЙе¶ВдЄЛпЉЪ

жЧґйЧіжИ≥зЪДеЃЪдєЙжШѓдїОдЄАдЄ™еЯЇеЗЖжЧґйЧіеЉАеІЛзЃЧиµЈпЉМињЩдЄ™еЯЇеЗЖжЧґйЧіжШѓгАМ1970-1-1 00:00:00 +0:00гАНпЉМдїОињЩдЄ™жЧґйЧіеЉАеІЛпЉМзФ®жХіжХ∞и°®з§ЇпЉМдї•зІТиЃ°жЧґпЉМйЪПзЭАжЧґйЧізЪДжµБйАЭињЩдЄ™жЧґйЧіжХіжХ∞дЄНжЦ≠еҐЮеК†гАВињЩж†ЈдЄАжЭ•пЉМжИСеП™йЬАи¶БдЄАдЄ™жХ∞еАЉпЉМе∞±еПѓдї•еЃМзЊОеЬ∞и°®з§ЇжЧґйЧідЇЖпЉМиАМдЄФињЩдЄ™жХ∞еАЉжШѓдЄАдЄ™зїЭеѓєжХ∞еАЉпЉМеН≥жЧ†иЃЇзЪДиЇЂе§ДеЬ∞зРГзЪДдїїдљХиІТиРљпЉМињЩдЄ™и°®з§ЇжЧґйЧізЪДжЧґйЧіжИ≥пЉМйГљжШѓдЄАж†ЈзЪДпЉМзФЯжИРзЪДжХ∞еАЉйГљжШѓдЄАж†ЈзЪДпЉМеєґдЄФж≤°жЬЙжЧґеМЇзЪДж¶ВењµпЉМжЙАдї•еЬ®з≥їзїЯзЪДдЄ≠жЧґйЧізЪДдЉ†иЊУдЄ≠пЉМйГљдЄНйЬАи¶БињЫи°МйҐЭе§ЦзЪДиљђжНҐдЇЖпЉМеП™жЬЙеЬ®жШЊз§ЇзїЩзФ®жИЈзЪДжЧґеАЩпЉМжЙНиљђжНҐдЄЇе≠Чзђ¶дЄ≤ж†ЉеЉПзЪДжЬђеЬ∞жЧґйЧігАВ

жХ∞жНЃеЇУдЄ≠еЃЮйЩЕжУНдљЬпЉЪ

entry.title: MySQLињЮжО•йЧЃйҐШ
entry.content:
дїКе§©жО•дЇЖдЄАдЄ™дїїеК°пЉМжККдєЛеЙНеЖЩе•љзЪДMapper дЄ≠зЪДSQLе§ЪињЮжО•дЄАеЉ†и°®пЉМ

зДґеРОдЄ≠йЧіеЗЇзО∞дЇЖдЄАдЄ™йЧЃйҐШ

ињЩж†ЈжШѓж≤°йФЩзЪДпЉМдљЖжШѓе¶ВжЮЬжККи°®зЪДй°ЇеЇПжНҐдЄАдЄЛ

е∞±дЉЪеЗЇйЧЃйҐШпЉМзРЖиЃЇдЄКжЭ•иѓіињЩж†ЈжШѓж≠£еЄЄзЪДпЉМдљЖжШѓеИЪеЉАеІЛзЪДжЧґеАЩз°ЃеЃЮењљзХ•зЪДињЩдЄ™йЧЃйҐШ

жѓХзЂЯжЬЙеЙНиЊИеЖЩзЪДдї£з†БпЉМеЃЮжИШдЄ≠йГљжШѓеЊИе§ЪеЉ†и°®еЕ≥иБФгАВ

entry.title: RE:4Swagger
entry.content:
1. жЈїеК†дЊЭиµЦ

https://blog.csdn.net/huangjinjin520/article/details/89740672

entry.title: RE:2зљСеЕ≥
entry.content:
йФЩиѓѓзЪДдЊЭиµЦ

ж≠£з°ЃзЪДдЊЭиµЦ

дљњзФ®IPж≥®еЖМеИ∞ж≥®еЖМдЄ≠ењГ

http://www.ityouknow.com/springcloud/2018/12/12/spring-cloud-gateway-start.html
entry.summary:
йФЩиѓѓзЪДдЊЭиµЦ

ж≠£з°ЃзЪДдЊЭиµЦ

entry.title: RE:3-UserService
entry.content:
дЊЭиµЦпЉЪ

йЕНзљЃ

TIPS

йАЪињЗeasyCode зФЯжИРзЪДдї£з†Б йЬАи¶БеЬ®applicationйЕНзљЃжЦЗдїґдЄ≠жЈїеК†пЉЪ

жК•йФЩпЉЪ

еЬ®жХ∞жНЃеЇУињЮжО•еРОжЈїеК†пЉЪ&serverTimezone=GMT
entry.summary: дЊЭиµЦпЉЪ

entry.title: RE:5UserService&Fegin
entry.content:
Fegin

@FeignClient(name = "goods-service"):жЬНеК°еРНзІ∞

@GetMapping("/goods/selectOne")пЉЪжШѓgoods-serviceдЄ≠иѓ•жО•еП£зЪДеЃМжХіиЈѓзФ±гАВ

ж≥®еЖМдЄ≠ењГпЉЪ

ApplicationAMIsAvailability ZonesStatus
GOODS-SERVICEn/a (1)(1)UP (1) - your ip:port
USER-SERVICEn/a (1)(1)UP (1) - your ip:port

UserService

https://github.com/fairyeye/store

1+1+1+1+1+1+1 = 7

6+5+4+3+2+1 =
entry.summary: Fegin

entry.title: RE:1 ж≥®еЖМдЄ≠ењГ
entry.content:
еЯЇз°АдЊЭиµЦ

ж≥®иІ£

еРѓеК®з±їдЄКеК†@EnableEurekaServerж≥®иІ£

storeйЬАи¶Бpom

application.yml

еПВиАГпЉЪ

http://www.ityouknow.com/springcloud/2017/05/10/springcloud-eureka.html

MySQL

зЙИжЬђпЉЪ8.0.19

entry.title: WHEN YOU HAVE A NEW PC
entry.content:
WHEN YOU HAVE A NEW PC

JavaзОѓеҐГйЕНзљЃ

1. еЃЙи£Е

вАЛ жПРеЙНжЦ∞еїЇдЄ§дЄ™жЦЗдїґе§єпЉМjdkпЉМjreпЉМйїШиЃ§иЈѓеЊДдєЯеПѓдї•

вАЛ еЃЙи£Еjdk-8u111-windows-x64.exe

вАЛ иЃЊзљЃjdkгАБjreзЪДиЈѓеЊД

2. йЕНзљЃзОѓеҐГеПШйЗП

вАЛ еП≥йФЃж≠§зФµиДС -> е±ЮжАІ -> йЂШзЇІз≥їзїЯиЃЊзљЃ -> зОѓеҐГеПШйЗП -> з≥їзїЯеПШйЗП(S)

вАЛ еП™жЬЙз≥їзїЯеПШйЗПжЙНжШѓеЕ®е±АзЪДгАВ

MavenзОѓеҐГйЕНзљЃ

  1. иІ£еОЛapache-maven-3.3.9.rar еИ∞жМЗеЃЪзЪДзЫЃељХгАВ
  2. дњЃжФєйЕНзљЃжЦЗдїґпЉИеОЛзЉ©еМЕеЈ≤дњЃжФєињЗпЉЙгАВ

GIT еЈ•еЕЈ

1. еЕ®е±АйЕНзљЃзФ®жИЈдњ°жБѓ
2. зФЯжИРkey

вАЛ зФЯжИРзЪДkeyжЦЗдїґ C:\Users\дљ†зЪДзФ®жИЈеРН\.ssh\id_rsa.pub

вАЛ зФ®жЦЗжЬђзЉЦиЊСеЩ®жЙУеЉАпЉМе§НеИґеИ∞GITдЄКгАВ

3. дЄКдЉ†й°єзЫЃеИ∞GIT

MySQL еЃЙи£Е

еЃЙи£Еhttps://www.runoob.com/mysql/mysql-install.html

дњЃжФєеИЭеІЛеѓЖз†Б

MySQLзЙИжЬђ5.7.6зЙИжЬђдї•еЙНзФ®жИЈеПѓдї•дљњзФ®е¶ВдЄЛеСљдї§пЉЪ

MySQLзЙИжЬђ5.7.6зЙИжЬђеЉАеІЛзЪДзФ®жИЈеПѓдї•дљњзФ®е¶ВдЄЛеСљдї§пЉЪ

зЩїељХжК•йФЩ https://www.cnblogs.com/lifan1998/p/9177731.html

еОїеЫЊж†З

вАЛ зЃ°зРЖеСШињРи°М еОїеЫЊж†З.bat жЦЗдїґгАВ

и∞Јж≠МиЃњйЧЃеК©жЙЛ

вАЛ и∞Јж≠МжµПиІИеЩ® -> жЫіе§ЪеЈ•еЕЈ -> жЙ©е±Хз®ЛеЇП -> еЉАеПСиАЕж®°еЉП(жЙУеЉА) гАВ

вАЛ жЛЦеК® и∞Јж≠МиЃњйЧЃеК©жЙЛ.crx еИ∞и∞Јж≠МжµПиІИеЩ®дЄ≠гАВ

иљѓдїґеЃЙи£ЕжЄЕеНХ

  • IDEAпЉЪиієдїАдєИиѓЭвА¶дљ†иГљеГПжИСдЄАж†ЈзФ®SublimeеЖЩдї£з†БпЉЯ
  • ChromeпЉЪеЕИи£ЕдЄ™жµПиІИеЩ®еРІ
entry.summary: WHEN YOU H

entry.title: Delete/Truncate/Drop
entry.content:
еБЗе¶ВжККдЄАеЉ†и°®жѓФдљЬдЄАйЧіжХЩеЃ§пЉМжХ∞жНЃжѓФдљЬе≠¶зФЯгАВ

drop е∞±жШѓжККињЩдїґжХЩеЄИзВЄжОЙдЇЖпЉМжХЩеЃ§йГљж≤°дЇЖпЉМжЫідЄНзФ®иѓіжХ∞жНЃдЇЖгАВ

truncate е∞±жШѓжККе≠¶зФЯеЉАйЩ§дЇЖпЉМз¶їеЉАдЇЖпЉМеЖНдєЯж≤°жЬЙдЇЖгАВ

delete е∞±жШѓе≠¶зФЯеЗЇеОїдЇЖпЉМиЩљзДґдїЦдїђеПѓиГљдЄНдЉЪеЫЮжЭ•дЇЖпЉМдљЖжШѓдљНзљЃињШжШѓи¶БзХЩзЭАгАВ

Drop

зЫіжО•еИ†жОЙи°®пЉМињЩдЄ™ж≤°дїАдєИе•љиѓізЪДгАВ

еМЕжЛђи°®зїУжЮДпЉМи°®жХ∞жНЃпЉМеЕ®йГ®еИ†йЩ§пЉМеН†зФ®зЪДз©ЇйЧідєЯдЉЪйЗКжФЊгАВ

Truncate

жИ™жЦ≠и°®пЉМдЉЪйЗКжФЊз©ЇйЧігАВ

Delete

еИ†йЩ§жХ∞жНЃ

entry.title: StringToInteger
entry.content:
String иљђ Integer

1.IntegerзЪДparseIntжЦєж≥Х

2.IntegerзЪДvalueOfжЦєж≥Х

дї•дЄКдЄ§зІНжЦєж≥ХйГљжШѓеПѓи°МзЪДгАВ

дљЖжШѓдЉЪжЬЙзЙєжЃКзЪДжГЕеЖµпЉМжѓФе¶ВпЉЪ

дљњзФ®stringToInt1()дєЯдЉЪињФеЫЮеРМж†ЈзЪДйФЩиѓѓгАВ

valueOf()и∞ГзФ®дЇЖparseInt()пЉМжЙАдї•ињФеЫЮеРМж†ЈзЪДйФЩиѓѓжШѓж≠£еЄЄзЪДгАВ

жМЙзЕІж≠£еЄЄзЪДйАїиЊСжЭ•иѓіпЉМжИСдїђйЬАи¶БеѓєињЩдЄ™йФЩиѓѓињЫи°Ме§ДзРЖпЉМжѓФе¶ВпЉЪ

еПѓдї•зЬЛеИ∞пЉМиЩљзДґдЊЭзДґжК•йФЩпЉМдљЖжШѓз®ЛеЇПињШжШѓзїІзї≠жЙІи°МдЇЖгАВ

зДґеРОеЫЮеИ∞дЄїйҐШгАВ

3.Guava зЪД Ints зїУеРИ Java8 зЪД Optional

еПѓдї•еЬ®иљђжНҐе§±иі•зЪДжЧґеАЩдЄЇдїЦиЃЊзљЃйїШиЃ§еАЉпЉЪ

еЖЩеЬ®жЬЂе∞ЊпЉЪдєЛжЙАдї•еЖЩињЩдєИиѓ¶зїЖжШѓеЫ†дЄЇжЬАеЉАеІЛзЪДжЧґеАЩжИСеЊИиПЬпЉМзЬЛеИЂдЇЇеЖЩзЪДжЦЗж°£йГљеЊИзЃАеНХпЉМиЩљзДґеПѓдї•иІ£еЖ≥йЧЃйҐШпЉМдљЖжШѓеНідЄНиІ£еЕґжДПпЉМжЙАдї•еЖЩзЪДеХ∞еЧ¶дЄАзВєпЉМеѓєжЦ∞жЙЛжѓФиЊГеПЛе•љгАВ

вАЛ

entry.title: GC
entry.content:
еЉХзФ®иЃ°жХ∞зЃЧж≥Х

вАЛ еОЯзРЖпЉЪжШѓеР¶жЬЙеѓєи±°еЉХзФ®гАВ

вАЛ

вАЛ зЉЇзВєпЉЪе¶ВжЮЬдЄ§дЄ™еѓєи±°дЇТзЫЄеЉХзФ®пЉМдЉЪйА†жИРеЖЕе≠Шж≥ДжЉПгАВ

еПѓиЊЊжАІеИЖжЮРж≥Х

вАЛ

Calendar

Modifier and TypeMethod and Description
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, int roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose scale is this.scale().
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, int scale, int roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose scale is as specified.
BigDecimaladd(BigDecimal augend)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this + augend), and whose scale is max(this.scale(), augend.scale()).
BigDecimaladd(BigDecimal augend, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this + augend), with rounding according to the context settings.
doubledoubleValue()Converts this BigDecimal to a double.
Modifier and TypeMethod and Description
BigDecimalabs()Returns a BigDecimal whose value is the absolute value of this BigDecimal, and whose scale is this.scale().
BigDecimalabs(MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is the absolute value of this BigDecimal, with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimaladd(BigDecimal augend)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this + augend), and whose scale is max(this.scale(), augend.scale()).
BigDecimaladd(BigDecimal augend, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this + augend), with rounding according to the context settings.
bytebyteValueExact()Converts this BigDecimal to a byte, checking for lost information.
intcompareTo(BigDecimal val)Compares this BigDecimal with the specified BigDecimal.
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose preferred scale is (this.scale() - divisor.scale()); if the exact quotient cannot be represented (because it has a non-terminating decimal expansion) an ArithmeticException is thrown.
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, int roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose scale is this.scale().
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, int scale, int roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose scale is as specified.
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, int scale, RoundingMode roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose scale is as specified.
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimaldivide(BigDecimal divisor, RoundingMode roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this / divisor), and whose scale is this.scale().
BigDecimal[]divideAndRemainder(BigDecimal divisor)Returns a two-element BigDecimal array containing the result of divideToIntegralValue followed by the result of remainder on the two operands.
BigDecimal[]divideAndRemainder(BigDecimal divisor, MathContext mc)Returns a two-element BigDecimal array containing the result of divideToIntegralValue followed by the result of remainder on the two operands calculated with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimaldivideToIntegralValue(BigDecimal divisor)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is the integer part of the quotient (this / divisor) rounded down.
BigDecimaldivideToIntegralValue(BigDecimal divisor, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is the integer part of (this / divisor).
doubledoubleValue()Converts this BigDecimal to a double.
booleanequals(Object x)Compares this BigDecimal with the specified Object for equality.
floatfloatValue()Converts this BigDecimal to a float.
inthashCode()Returns the hash code for this BigDecimal.
intintValue()Converts this BigDecimal to an int.
intintValueExact()Converts this BigDecimal to an int, checking for lost information.
longlongValue()Converts this BigDecimal to a long.
longlongValueExact()Converts this BigDecimal to a long, checking for lost information.
BigDecimalmax(BigDecimal val)Returns the maximum of this BigDecimal and val.
BigDecimalmin(BigDecimal val)Returns the minimum of this BigDecimal and val.
BigDecimalmovePointLeft(int n)Returns a BigDecimal which is equivalent to this one with the decimal point moved n places to the left.
BigDecimalmovePointRight(int n)Returns a BigDecimal which is equivalent to this one with the decimal point moved n places to the right.
BigDecimalmultiply(BigDecimal multiplicand)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this √Ч multiplicand), and whose scale is (this.scale() + multiplicand.scale()).
BigDecimalmultiply(BigDecimal multiplicand, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this √Ч multiplicand), with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimalnegate()Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (-this), and whose scale is this.scale().
BigDecimalnegate(MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (-this), with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimalplus()Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (+this), and whose scale is this.scale().
BigDecimalplus(MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (+this), with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimalpow(int n)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (thisn), The power is computed exactly, to unlimited precision.
BigDecimalpow(int n, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (thisn).
intprecision()Returns the precision of this BigDecimal.
BigDecimalremainder(BigDecimal divisor)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this % divisor).
BigDecimalremainder(BigDecimal divisor, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this % divisor), with rounding according to the context settings.
BigDecimalround(MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal rounded according to the MathContext settings.
intscale()Returns the scale of this BigDecimal.
BigDecimalscaleByPowerOfTen(int n)Returns a BigDecimal whose numerical value is equal to (this * 10n).
BigDecimalsetScale(int newScale)Returns a BigDecimal whose scale is the specified value, and whose value is numerically equal to this BigDecimalвАШs.
BigDecimalsetScale(int newScale, int roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose scale is the specified value, and whose unscaled value is determined by multiplying or dividing this BigDecimalвАШs unscaled value by the appropriate power of ten to maintain its overall value.
BigDecimalsetScale(int newScale, RoundingMode roundingMode)Returns a BigDecimal whose scale is the specified value, and whose unscaled value is determined by multiplying or dividing this BigDecimalвАШs unscaled value by the appropriate power of ten to maintain its overall value.
shortshortValueExact()Converts this BigDecimal to a short, checking for lost information.
intsignum()Returns the signum function of this BigDecimal.
BigDecimalstripTrailingZeros()Returns a BigDecimal which is numerically equal to this one but with any trailing zeros removed from the representation.
BigDecimalsubtract(BigDecimal subtrahend)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this - subtrahend), and whose scale is max(this.scale(), subtrahend.scale()).
BigDecimalsubtract(BigDecimal subtrahend, MathContext mc)Returns a BigDecimal whose value is (this - subtrahend), with rounding according to the context settings.
BigIntegertoBigInteger()Converts this BigDecimal to a BigInteger.
BigIntegertoBigIntegerExact()Converts this BigDecimal to a BigInteger, checking for lost information.
StringtoEngineeringString()Returns a string representation of this BigDecimal, using engineering notation if an exponent is needed.
StringtoPlainString()Returns a string representation of this BigDecimal without an exponent field.
StringtoString()Returns the string representation of this BigDecimal, using scientific notation if an exponent is needed.
BigDecimalulp()Returns the size of an ulp, a unit in the last place, of this BigDecimal.
BigIntegerunscaledValue()Returns a BigInteger whose value is the unscaled value of this BigDecimal.
static BigDecimalvalueOf(double val)Translates a double into a BigDecimal, using the doubleвАШs canonical string representation provided by the Double.toString(double) method.
static BigDecimalvalueOf(long val)Translates a long value into a BigDecimal with a scale of zero.
static BigDecimalvalueOf(long unscaledVal, int scale)Translates a long unscaled value and an int scale into a BigDecimal.
entry.summary:
Calendar

<
Modifier and Type

entry.content:
StringжХ∞зїДиљђintжХ∞зїД

еБЗиЃЊжИСдїђжЬЙдЄАдЄ™е≠Чзђ¶дЄ≤жХ∞зїДпЉЪ

дљњзФ®Lambdaи°®иЊЊеЉПпЉИиЗ™Java 8иµЈпЉЙпЉЪ

еП¶дЄАзІНжЦєеЉПпЉЪ

еЬЇжЩѓпЉЪ

еПВжХ∞дЄЇдЄАдЄ™listпЉМдљЖжШѓдЄНз°ЃеЃЪдїЦжШѓnullињШжШѓsizeдЄЇ0пЉМе¶ВжЮЬеРМжЧґеИ§жЦ≠зЪДиѓЭпЉМељУдїЦдЄЇnullжЧґ дЉЪеЗЇзО∞nullPointException,

еПѓдї•зФ® ||

еНХдЄ™зЪДйАїиЊСињРзЃЧзђ¶дЉЪе∞ЖеЈ¶еП≥дЄ§дЄ™и°®иЊЊеЉПйГљињЫи°МињРзЃЧеЊЧеЗЇеЄГе∞ФеАЉпЉМеЖНињЫи°МињРзЃЧгАВ

File - > Other Setting -> Setting For New Projects еЕ®е±АйЕНзљЃ

mavenйїШиЃ§дїУеЇУеЬ∞еЭАпЉМйАЙжЛ©жЬђеЬ∞зЪДеЬ∞еЭА

<localRepository>D:\maven_repo</localRepository>

Setting -> file and code temeplate -> include

entry.title: жЧґйЧіжИ≥ -> Date
entry.content:
еЯЇз°АдЊЭиµЦ

еРОжЭ•еПСзО∞жШѓжИСжЛњеИ∞зЪДжЧґйЧіжИ≥жШѓдї• зІТ дЄЇеНХдљНзЪДпЉМиАМиљђжНҐжЧґйЬАи¶БзЪДжШѓ жѓЂзІТгАВ
entry.summary:
еЯЇз°АдЊЭиµЦ

еРОжЭ•еПСзО∞жШѓжИСжЛњеИ∞зЪДжЧґйЧіжИ≥жШѓдї• зІТ дЄЇеНХдљНзЪДпЉМиАМиљђжНҐжЧґйЬАи¶БзЪДжШѓ жѓЂзІТгАВ

entry.title: Java 8 Stream
entry.content:
Filter

Returns a stream consisting of the elements of this stream that match the given predicate.

This is an intermediate operation.

  • Parameters:

    predicate - a non-interfering, stateless predicate to apply to each element to determine if it should be included

  • Returns:

    the new stream

GroupBy
entry.summary: Filter
